name: read_spec
description: Run artifact-lint against a spec directory to surface the canonical inventory of required artifacts (spec.md/design.md/scopes.md/report.md/uservalidation.md/state.json), their existence + structure status, and any blocking lint failures. Wraps artifact-lint.sh. Use as a first-pass 'what shape is this spec in?' query before deeper validation.

spec_dir.description: Spec directory relative to repo root.

scenario_regex.description: Optional regex to scope scenario-id matching (e.g. 'SCN-037-[A-Z][0-9]{2}').
